modules.title: Core JS & Modern CSS Layouts
modules.description: Master closures, scope, promises, async/await, event loops, along with responsive CSS layouts using CSS Grid, Flexbox, and Tailwind/Vanilla custom properties.
exercises: Create a vanilla JS dashboard with custom styling showing responsive card grids
Implement custom custom event emitters and promises from scratch

modules.title: React Fundamentals & State Architecture
modules.description: Deep dive into React lifecycle, reconciliation, hooks (custom hooks), context API, and advanced state management patterns (Redux/Zustand).
resources: Kent C. Dodds articles on React State Colocation
exercises: Build a stateful application showcasing dynamic contexts and custom performance hooks
Optimize a slow component tree using useMemo, useCallback, and React.memo

modules.title: Web Performance & Build Tools
modules.description: Learn code-splitting, lazy loading, image optimizations, bundlers (Vite/Webpack), asset pipelines, and core web vitals measurement.
resources: Vite official guides on code splitting
exercises: Deploy a React app and optimize its LCP score to exceed 95 on Lighthouse
Configure a custom Vite project with manual chunking

modules.title: System Design & Web Security
modules.description: Understand client-side storage, CSRF/XSS prevention, authentication strategies (OAuth, JWT, HTTPOnly cookies), and offline support.
resources: OWASP Top Ten Web Application Security Risks
exercises: Implement an authorization wrapper with token expiration handling
Build a secure checkout mock form with input sanitation
